calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Accountings, For Instructions To Trustee To Allocate And Distribute Trust Assets, For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property And Trustee And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martha Daetwyler, via ZOOM, counsel for Mary Christenson, Trustee; Konstantine Demiris, via ZOOM, counsel for Evelyn Hurwich, Benficiary; J. Frederick Clarke, via ZOOM, counsel for Allan Statman, Beneficiary.

At the outset, the court advises Ms. Daetwyler that it is inclined to adopt its tentative ruling in this matter that venue for this petition is not proper as the petitioner lives out of state and the real property at issue is located in Berkeley. The court reminds Ms. Daetwyler that pursuant to code, the principal place of administration of a trust is the usual place where the day-to-day activity of the trust is carried on by the person primarily responsible for the administration of the trust. Additionally, the court reiterates that a trustee has the duty not to delegate said responsibilities to their attorney. Ms. Daetwyler provides oral argument to support her petition. The court asks counsel if any if anyone else would like to address the court. No additional testimony is presented.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Approval, etc., is dismissed without prejudice.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
